text: By the fig and the olive ˹of Jerusalem˺,
and this secure city ˹of Mecca˺! <sup foot_note=1317>1317</sup>

foot_notes.1317: This passage refers to the land of figs and olives where Jesus ( ﷺ ) lived, Mount Sinai where Moses ( ﷺ ) communicated with Allah, and the city of Mecca where the Prophet ( ﷺ ) started his mission. A similar reference can be found in Deuteronomy 33:1, ˹Moses proclaimed:˺ “The Lord came from Sinai. Rising from Seir upon us, he [ sic ] shone forth from Mount Paran.” Seir is a mountain near Jerusalem, and Paran is a mountain near Mecca.

text: Indeed, We created humans in the best form.
But We will reduce them to the lowest of the low ˹in Hell˺,
except those who believe and do good—they will have a never-ending reward.
Now, what makes you deny the ˹final˺ Judgment?
Is Allah not the most just of all judges?
